zh.lifeSummary: 當Nest ferch Gruffudd於1059年4月7日出生在威爾士福林爾爾德藍時，她的父親Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales53歲，母親Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia17歲。她於1078年與Osbern le Scrope在威爾士福林爾爾德藍結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1152年7月2日在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾享年93歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nest ferch Gruffudd于1059年4月7日出生在威尔士福林爾爾德藍时，她的父亲Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales53岁，母亲Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia17岁。她于1078年与Osbern le Scrope在威尔士福林爾爾德藍结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1152年7月2日在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾享年93岁。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Griffith
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

nameMeanings.name: Nest
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of Nest, a Welsh pet form of Agnes ; the name of the grandmother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’).

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: When Nest ferch Gruffudd was born on 7 April 1059, in Rhuddlan, Flintshire, Wales, her father, Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales, was 53 and her mother, Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia, was 17. She married Osbern le Scrope in 1078, in Rhuddlan, Flintshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 2 July 1152, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 93.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nest ferch Gruffudd est née le 7 avril 1059, à Rhuddlan, Flintshire, Galles, son père, Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Osbern le Scrope en 1078, à Rhuddlan, Flintshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 2 juillet 1152, à Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 93 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nest ferch Gruffudd am 7. April 1059 in Rhuddlan, Flintshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales 53 und ihre Mutter Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia 17. Sie hat 1078 in Rhuddlan, Flintshire, Wales Osbern le Scrope geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 2. Juli 1152 im Alter von 93 Jahren in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

ht.Arwystli, Montgomeryshire, Wales: Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nest ferch Gruffudd è nata il il 7 aprile 1059 nel Rhuddlan, Flintshire, Galles, sua padre, Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales, aveva 53 anni e sua madre, Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Osbern le Scrope nel 1078, nel Rhuddlan, Flintshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 2 luglio 1152, nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 93 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nest ferch Gruffuddが1059年4月7日にウェールズフリントシュアイアルハッドランで生まれた時，父Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Walesは53歳，母Ealdgyth Edith of Merciaは17歳であった。1078年にウェールズフリントシュアイアルハッドランでOsbern le Scropeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1152年7月2日にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアで93歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nest ferch Gruffudd(이)가 1059년 4월 7일 웨일스 플린츠히르 후들런에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales(은)는 53세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1078년 웨일스 플린츠히르 후들런에서 Osbern le Scrope(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1152년 7월 2일 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 93세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.7 April 1059–2 July 1152: 7 de abril de 1059–2 de julho de 1152
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nest ferch Gruffudd nasceu em 7 de abril de 1059, em Rhuddlan, Flintshire, Gales, seu pai, Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Osbern le Scrope em 1078, em Rhuddlan, Flintshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 2 de julho de 1152, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 93 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nest ferch Gruffudd родилась 7 апреля 1059 г. в местности руддлан, флинцхир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Osbern le Scrope в 1078 г. в местности руддлан, флинцхир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 2 июля 1152 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 93 лет.

es.7 April 1059–2 July 1152: 7 de abril de 1059–2 de julio de 1152
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nest ferch Gruffudd nació el 7 de abril de 1059, en Rhuddlan, Flintshire, Gales, su papá, Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Osbern le Scrope en 1078, en Rhuddlan, Flintshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 2 de julio de 1152, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 93 años.
